name: pearcup-world-cup
description: World Cup bracket pools, watch parties, multilingual QVAC commentary, and P2P soccer minigames for Pear.

scripts.refresh:kawaii-live: keyvault exec --scope sports/football-data sh -c 'FOOTBALL_DATA_KEY="$API_KEY" node app/fetch-live.mjs'
scripts.check:kawaii-runtime: node --check app/index.cjs && node --check app/pear-worker.cjs && node --check app/swarm-worker.cjs && node --check scripts/build-kawaii-boot.mjs && node scripts/build-kawaii-boot.mjs --check && node --check scripts/check-kawaii-runtime.mjs && node scripts/check-kawaii-runtime.mjs
scripts.test:kawaii-peer: node --test app/index-entry.test.js app/peer-hiverelay.test.js app/peer-net.test.js app/peer-match.test.js app/app-deeplink.test.js app/peer-preview-smoke.test.js app/watch-voice.test.js app/runtime-settings.test.js app/qvac-trivia.test.js app/polymarket-odds.test.js app/polymarket-ui.test.js app/live-relay-ui.test.js app/wallet-safety.test.js
scripts.check:kawaii-peer: node --check app/peer-hiverelay.js && node --check app/peer-net.js && node --check app/peer-preview-smoke.test.js && node --check scripts/verify-hiverelay-conformance.mjs && node --check scripts/audit-pear-release-scope.mjs && node --check scripts/build-pearbrowser-hyper.mjs && node --check scripts/record-friend-test-result.mjs && node --check scripts/record-latest-friend-test-result.mjs && node --check scripts/launch-status-latest.mjs && node --check scripts/publish-approved-latest-pearcup.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-pearbrowser-hyper.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-pearbrowser-serve.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-pearbrowser-published-local.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-published-pearbrowser.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-published-pearbrowser-runtime.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-published-pearbrowser.test.mjs && node --check scripts/serve-pearbrowser-hyper.mjs && node --check scripts/serve-pearbrowser-published-local.mjs && node --check scripts/prepare-pearbrowser-release.mjs && node --check scripts/check-pearbrowser-publish-handoff.mjs && node --check scripts/check-pear-seamless.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-kawaii-pear-run.mjs && npm run check:kawaii-runtime && npm run test:kawaii-peer && node --test scripts/record-friend-test-result.test.mjs scripts/record-latest-friend-test-result.test.mjs scripts/launch-status-latest.test.mjs scripts/publish-approved-pearcup.test.mjs scripts/publish-approved-latest-pearcup.test.mjs scripts/smoke-published-pearbrowser.test.mjs scripts/prepare-pearbrowser-release.test.mjs scripts/check-pear-seamless.test.mjs && npm run smoke:pearbrowser-hyper && npm run smoke:pearbrowser-serve && npm run smoke:pearbrowser-published-local && npm run build:pearbrowser
scripts.check: npm test && npm run audit:pear-browser -- --require-pass && npm run check:kawaii-peer && npm run check:friend-ready && npm run check:publish-handoff && node --check app/core.js && node --check app/adapters.js && node --check app/runtime-config.js && node --check app/runtime-settings.js && node --check app/storage-sim.js && node --check app/worker-sim.js && node --check app/worker-client.js && node --check app/worker-bridge-protocol.js && node --check app/pear-worker.cjs && node --check app/worker-runtime.js && node --check app/settlement-receipts.js && node --check app/settlement-service.js && node --check app/trusted-path-preflight.js && node --check app/live-readiness.js && node --check app/live-launch-audit.js && node --check app/transport-sim.js && node --check app/qvac-referee.js && node --check app/tether-wdk-bridge.js && node --check app/sdk-runtime.js && node --check app/app.js && node --check scripts/serve.mjs && node --check scripts/preflight-sdk.mjs && node --check scripts/preflight-worker-runtime.mjs && node --check scripts/preflight-trusted-path.mjs && node --check scripts/live-readiness.mjs && node --check scripts/live-config.mjs && node --check scripts/live-launch-audit.mjs && node --check scripts/pear-browser-compat.mjs
